item.name: Oppressor Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near the oppressor will magically bring the luxuriously appointed warmachina to life.

mount.name: Oppressor
mount.action: Summon your oppressor mount, a weapon of war-turned-conveyance of comfort.
mount.description: Originally an autonomous weapon developed by the Illuminati, this oppressor underwent a conversion to be able to carry a pilot. While the process necessitated the stripping of munitions, what the machina loses in destructive capabilities, it gains in luxury and comfort.
mount.tooltip:
What did you expect you were
in for, a luxurious litter ride!?
- Sicard
